content: هُوَ ماشي عَكس الناس كُلَّها وَمِفَكِّر نَفسه صَحّ

transcriptions.arabizi: huwa maeshi Aaks ilnaes kull|aha wa mifakkar nafs|uh sahh

relationships: eng:he is going against the crowd and he thinks that he himself is right
